info.title: Outlets Service
info.description: Manages press outlets (publications) and their campaign relevance data. Routes are organized under /org (requires x-api-key + x-org-id) and /internal (requires x-api-key only).

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: API key for authenticating requests. Required on all routes except /health and /openapi.json.

post.description: Upserts by outlet_domain — if the domain already exists, updates the name/url. Callers should provide campaign/brand/feature/workflow headers for proper context.

example.whyRelevant: Top tech publication with high domain authority
example.whyNotRelevant: Highly competitive, may not accept guest posts

get.description: Returns outlets deduplicated by outlet_id with nested campaign data. Always scoped by x-org-id. Filter by campaignId, brandId, status, featureSlug(s), or featureDynastySlug.

parameters.name: featureDynastySlug
parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolved via features-service)

200.description: List of deduplicated outlets with nested campaigns

patch.description: Updates the status of an outlet within a campaign. Requires x-campaign-id to identify the campaign_outlet row.

post.description: Callers should provide campaign/brand/feature/workflow headers. Max 500 outlets per request.
Full-text search (ILIKE) on outlet name and URL, scoped by org.

get.description: Returns outlet discovery stats. Supports filtering and groupBy.
Returns aggregated discovery costs via runs-service.

post.description: Runs outlet discovery: generates categories, searches Google, scores results, inserts into buffer.
Returns up to `count` highest-scored open outlets. Auto-discovers if buffer is empty.

get.summary: Lookup outlets by IDs and/or campaignId
get.description: Internal endpoint — requires only x-api-key, no org context. At least one of `ids` or `campaignId` must be provided.
